input.prompt:
My .NET MAUI page shows blank labels even though my ViewModel properties
have values. Here is my XAML:
```xml
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml">
    <VerticalStackLayout>
        <Label Text="{Binding Title}" />
        <Label Text="{Binding Description}" />
    </VerticalStackLayout>
</ContentPage>
```
What am I doing wrong?

data.reasoningText: The user is asking about a common .NET MAUI data binding issue. The labels are blank because the `BindingContext` is never set, and/or the ViewModel doesn't implement `INotifyPropertyChanged`. Let me provide a concise answer.
